title: senecillis botryodes
intro: Senecillis botryodes, also known as the grey ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Senecillis botryodes include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying the leaves and flowers to create teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
